author: barnabasbusa
content:
<@316280621783580673> 

Verdict: nethermind is wrong.

The chain config explicitly sets via EIP-7892:
MAX_BLOBS_PER_BLOCK: 6              # deneb
MAX_BLOBS_PER_BLOCK_ELECTRA: 9      # electra
BLOB_SCHEDULE:
    MAX_BLOBS_PER_BLOCK: 15         # fulu — the active value

- Ethrex 12.0.0: respects BLOB_SCHEDULE.MAX_BLOBS_PER_BLOCK=15 → accepts the 15-blob block. Correct.
- Nethermind 1.39.0-unstable: enforces 6-blob hard cap (786432 blob_gas = 6 × 131072) → rejects. Wrong — hasn't picked up EIP-7892's dynamic schedule for Fulu.

Both Prysm-1 (ethrex-side) and Prysm-4 (nethermind-side) faithfully follow their EL's forkchoice ruling, which is why the CL clients align cleanly per EL — there's no CL bug here, just an EL-spec mismatch.

Fix needs to land in nethermind (read BLOB_SCHEDULE at the Fulu fork epoch). Worth pinging the nethermind team with this snippet:

Invalid block 3 (...): BlockBlobGasExceeded:
A block cannot have more than 786432 blob gas, blobs count 15, blobs gas used: 1966080
ExtraData: ethrex 12.0.0

author: barnabasbusa
content:
```yaml
participants_matrix:
  el:
    - el_type: ethrex
      el_image: ethpandaops/ethrex:glamsterdam-devnet-4
    - el_type: nethermind
      el_image: ethpandaops/nethermind:glamsterdam-devnet-4
  cl:
    - cl_type: prysm
      cl_image: ethpandaops/prysm-beacon-chain:glamsterdam-devnet-4-tmp
    - cl_type: lodestar
      cl_image: ethpandaops/lodestar:glamsterdam-devnet-4
    - cl_type: lighthouse
      cl_image: ethpandaops/lighthouse:glamsterdam-devnet-4
  count: 1

network_params:
  preset: mainnet
  gloas_fork_epoch: 1

assertoor_params:
  tests:
    - { file: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ethpandaops/assertoor/refs/heads/master/playbooks/pectra-dev/validator-lifecycle-test-v3.yaml" }
    - { file: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ethpandaops/assertoor/refs/heads/master/playbooks/gloas-dev/builder-lifecycle.yaml" }

snooper_enabled: true

spamoor_params:
  image: ethpandaops/spamoor:master
  spammers:
    - scenario: eoatx
      config:
        throughput: 100
    - scenario: blob-combined
      config:
        throughput: 10
        sidecars: 5
    - scenario: evm-fuzz
      config:
        throughput: 50

global_log_level: debug

additional_services:
  - dora
  - assertoor
  - spamoor

port_publisher:
  additional_services:
    enabled: true

```
